checks.describe: the Website CRD declares a status subresource (spec/status split — the operator owns status, users own spec)
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get crd websites.kubeadv.io -o jsonpath='status-subresource={.spec.versions[0].subresources.status}'; echo

checks.describe: the CRD carries the in-process CEL guardrail self.replicas <= 5 as an x-kubernetes-validations rule
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get crd websites.kubeadv.io -o yaml | grep -A2 'x-kubernetes-validations:' | grep 'rule:'

checks.describe: the structural schema prunes a field it does not declare and defaults image (self-seeded with --validate=false in m5-dd-check, then removed)
the CRD advertises additionalPrinterColumns so kubectl get websites shows Host/Replicas/Ready (a built-in-like UX for the custom kind)
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get crd websites.kubeadv.io -o jsonpath='{range .spec.versions[0].additionalPrinterColumns[*]}{.name}{" "}{end}'; echo
